title: Will China's Jan-May 2026 trade growth exceed 5.3%?
description: The General Administration of Customs reported that China's total import and export value for January-April 2026 grew 5.3% year-on-year, beating market expectations. This question asks whether the year-on-year growth rate for the cumulative January-May 2026 period (the next scheduled release) will be strictly higher than 5.3%.
resolution_criteria: Resolves to YES if the official data from the General Administration of Customs shows that the year-on-year growth rate of China's total imports and exports (in RMB terms) for January-May 2026 is strictly greater than 5.3%. Resolves to NO if it is equal to or less than 5.3%, or if the data is not released by the cutoff date.
source_news: 中国海关总署：1-4月份进出口总值同比增长5.3%，超出市场预期。
